target.title: initNDX seeded default prompt enters buildContext
target.test: After initNDX seeds the temporary user home, buildContext must include the seeded default model prompt in the developer context.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "buildContext uses initNDX seeded default model prompt".
